text:

Log:
  net-p2p/libtorrent-rasterbar: drop clang workaround (reverting r529947)

  Old -CURRENT snapshots are not supported while Clang assertions
  are disabled on FreeBSD -RELEASEs and -STABLE branches.

  PR:		244830
